Let's start

a conversation

Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear about it. Fill out the form below or reach out directly — we typically respond within 24 hours.

Get in touch

Emailandy.li.zhang2010@gmail.com
Phone+1 (603) 306-7508
LocationHanover, New Hampshire
AvailabilityMon-Fri, 9am-6pm EST

Response Time

We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days. For urgent matters, please call us directly.

FAQ

Common questions

What is included in the $1000 package?

Everything you need to get online: a custom domain, 5 professionally designed pages, mobile-responsive layout, cinematic animations, fast performance, and SEO optimization. No hidden fees.

How long does it take to build?

Most websites are completed within 1-2 weeks from start to finish. We work efficiently without sacrificing quality.

What if I need more than 5 pages?

We can add additional pages for $100 each. Just let us know what you need during our discovery call.

Do you offer ongoing support?

Yes! We offer a $40/month maintenance package that includes hosting, security updates, and minor content changes.

Join Our Mission

Support the future of
haptic technology

Help Team 26532 bring innovation to life. Your support funds robot parts, competition fees, and haptic technology development.
